overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a stormy urban environment with modern skyscrapers. The player approaches and circles a stationary autonomous shuttle bus before continuing through a concrete plaza and ascending stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet urban street with modern office buildings

events.description: moves from concrete sidewalk onto the wet asphalt street surface
approaching stationary autonomous shuttle bus ahead on the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet street toward a stationary autonomous shuttle

notable_agents.action: stationary green and yellow autonomous shuttle with 'OUT OF SERVICE' display blocking the road ahead

entered.detail: tall building with distinctive diagonal exterior support beams and dark facade
cluster of dark glass high-rise towers visible under storm clouds
red fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge
green hedge row lining the street side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy urban street with wet asphalt reflecting the overcast sky. The camera moves forward past a red fire hydrant, approaching a stationary green autonomous shuttle. Modern office buildings with distinctive diagonal beams line the right side while glass skyscrapers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: street area surrounding the autonomous shuttle

events.description: begins circling around the shuttle bus counter-clockwise for close inspection
close-up view reveals 'OUT OF SERVICE 505' signage and cartoon character decal on shuttle side

agents.ego_description: circling around the stationary shuttle to examine it from all sides, focusing on the detailed exterior graphics

notable_agents.action: stationary autonomous shuttle with 'JUMP ON' branding and 'INCHEON/SONGDO' text being circled by the player

segments.scene_description: The camera circles closely around the stationary autonomous shuttle, revealing detailed branding including 'OUT OF SERVICE 505' and a cartoon bear character. The surrounding modern buildings shift in perspective as the player moves around the vehicle, with the stormy sky visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open concrete plaza with digital signage

events.description: exits the street and enters the open concrete plaza area
turns left toward the plaza center, moving away from the shuttle toward a digital billboard

agents.ego_description: walking away from the shuttle into the expansive concrete plaza toward a tall digital display

entered.detail: tall vertical digital screen displaying green bottle advertisement
large open paved area with geometric concrete tile patterns

segments.scene_description: Leaving the shuttle behind, the scene opens into a vast concrete plaza with geometric paving patterns. The camera moves toward a tall digital billboard displaying a green bottle advertisement, with the stormy urban skyline visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza with bike parking and tiered seating

events.description: passing bike rack area with several parked bicycles on the right
approaching wide tiered concrete staircase ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza passing bike racks and sculptural trees toward a large staircase

entered.detail: metal bike parking racks with several parked bicycles
sculptural pruned trees with curved trunks in planters
wide tiered concrete steps leading upward to elevated walkway
low white concrete seating walls along the plaza edge

segments.scene_description: The camera continues through the plaza, passing metal bike racks with parked bicycles on the right and sculptural trees on the left. Low concrete bench walls line the area as the camera approaches a wide set of tiered concrete stairs leading upward.

events.description: begins ascending the wide concrete stairs
reaching the top of the stairs, continuing on elevated pathway

agents.ego_description: climbing the wide concrete stairs and continuing forward on the elevated walkway surrounded by trees

entered.detail: metal handrails along the left side of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the wide tiered concrete stairs, with metal railings visible on the left. Upon reaching the top, the scene continues on an elevated walkway surrounded by trees and greenery, with the urban skyline still visible through the storm clouds.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a stormy urban center that transitions from a narrow street into a wide concrete plaza and finally ascends to an elevated green walkway. It begins on wet asphalt reflecting an overcast sky, moving past a red fire hydrant toward a stationary green autonomous shuttle flanked by modern office buildings with diagonal beams. As the camera circles the shuttle to reveal its branding and a cartoon bear character, the perspective shifts before the scene opens into a vast concrete plaza featuring geometric paving and a tall digital billboard. The camera then glides through the plaza past parked bicycles and sculptural trees, moving toward a wide set of tiered concrete stairs. Finally, the camera ascends these stairs and reaches an elevated walkway surrounded by greenery, with the stormy skyline remaining visible in the distance.
